hooks.command: bash -c 'mkdir -p .memory-bank/.logs && SESSION_ID="$(date +%s)-$$" && echo "$SESSION_ID" > .memory-bank/.logs/.session-start && echo "[$(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")] [Session: $SESSION_ID] Session started" >> .memory-bank/.logs/session-history.log'
hooks.description: Generate session ID and log session start
Update archive indexes after any subagent completes

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .memory-bank/active-task.md ]; then grep -q "Current Domain: " .memory-bank/active-task.md 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q "Current Domain: none" .memory-bank/active-task.md 2>/dev/null && echo "Active domain detected" || true; fi'
hooks.description: Detect active domain on new user prompts
